titles.en: Chapter on Singing and Poetry During Travel
Chapter on Singing and Poetry During Travel

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «زَادُ اَلْمُسَافِرِ اَلْحُدَاءُ وَ اَلشِّعْرُ مَا كَانَ مِنْهُ لَيْسَ فِيهِ خَناً ».
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «زَادُ اَلْمُسَافِرِ اَلْحُدَاءُ وَ اَلشِّعْرُ مَا كَانَ مِنْهُ لَيْسَ فِيهِ خَناً ».

segments:
Hadith.2447 - Al-Sakuni narrated with his chain of transmission that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"The provision of the traveller is chanting and poetry, as long as it contains nothing immoral."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2447 - Al-Sakuni narrated with his chain of transmission that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"The provision of the traveller is chanting and poetry, as long as it contains nothing immoral."
